description: Complete brand rename from 'Happiness Fashion' to 'Happiness Fashion World' across all files, plus redesign the logo SVG to reflect the new name with an 'HFW' monogram.
steps: Update index.html: change <title> to 'Happiness Fashion World - Luxury Bespoke Couture | Abakaliki, Nigeria', update meta description to reference 'Happiness Fashion World', update og:title to 'Happiness Fashion World - Luxury Bespoke Couture', update Schema.org 'name' to 'Happiness Fashion World', update apple-mobile-web-app-title to 'Happiness Fashion World'
Update public/manifest.webmanifest: change 'name' to 'Happiness Fashion World - Luxury Bespoke Couture', 'short_name' to 'HFW Couture'

Redesign public/favicon.svg: Replace the HF monogram with an elegant 'HFW' monogram (or stylized crown/needle integrated into HFW letters). Keep the warm brown plate (#3D2B1F) and gold gradient. Make the three-cowrie accent slightly more prominent as a Nigerian cultural element.

Redesign src/components/Logo.tsx: Update the SVG to match the new favicon (HFW monogram). Update the wordmark text from 'Happiness' / 'Fashion . Nigeria' to 'Happiness Fashion World' with a refined subtitle like 'Luxury Couture . Nigeria'. Update the aria-label.
Update src/components/Footer.tsx: Change the copyright text from 'Happiness Fashion' to 'Happiness Fashion World'
Update src/utils/chatbot.ts: Change Joy's greeting from referencing 'Happiness's AI fashion assistant' to 'Happiness Fashion World's AI fashion assistant'
Update src/components/Chatbot.tsx: Change the aria-label on the launcher button from 'Chat with Joy, Happiness's AI assistant' to 'Chat with Joy, Happiness Fashion World's AI stylist'
Update src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Update the generalEnquiryMessage and orderMessage to say 'Happiness Fashion World' instead of just 'Happiness'

Update src/components/Contact.tsx: Change 'atelier@happinessfashion.com' to 'hello@happinessfashionworld.com', update references to 'Happiness' as brand name to 'Happiness Fashion World' where contextually appropriate
Update README.md title and description references from 'Happiness Fashion' to 'Happiness Fashion World'
acceptance_criteria: No occurrence of the old brand name 'Happiness Fashion' as a standalone brand reference remains (contextual uses of 'Happiness' as a person name are fine)
The Logo SVG renders an elegant HFW monogram with Nigerian cultural accents
The favicon.svg matches the new Logo component
npx tsc -b passes with zero errors
findings: Also updated brand references found in About.tsx, DesignCard.tsx, Lightbox.tsx, QrPanel.tsx, geminiChat.ts, SUPABASE_SETUP.md, and package.json that were not in the original step list. References to 'Happiness' as a person name (Chat with Happiness, the Happiness signature) were intentionally kept as-is per acceptance criteria.
